raw: Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. The pass includes access to: Hale's South Entrance parking lots; private beach access with swimming and boating; picnic/playground areas; restrooms and rinse stations; volleyball and basketball courts; canoes, kayaks, and more. South Beach Access — Pre-Season: May 23–June 21, weekends only, 12–6 PM; Program Season: June 22–Aug. 16, weekdays 9 AM–7 PM, weekends 10 AM–6 PM; Post-Season: Aug. 17–31, daily, 12–6 PM.

_audit_note: 2026-05-28 strict_audit: remapped from discontinued physical parking/hiking pass to the current 'Hale South Beach Day' digital pass (testhalebeach), per operator confirmation. Old pass excluded beach use; new pass IS the beach day pass. capacity kept per-vehicle (day pass covers South Entrance parking + carload beach access); seasonal May–Aug.
